name: Cell Freezing Medium (10% DMSO)

notes.en: Prepare fresh or pre-chill at 4°C. DMSO is a penetrating cryoprotectant that prevents ice crystal formation. After resuspending cells, transfer quickly to cryovials, use a controlled-rate freezing container (-1°C/min) to -80°C, then move to liquid nitrogen after 24h. DMSO is cytotoxic at 37°C — dilute promptly after thawing.
notes.zh: 使用前现配或 4°C 预冷。DMSO 是渗透性冷冻保护剂，防止冰晶形成。细胞重悬后迅速转移至冻存管，使用梯度降温盒 (-1°C/min) 放入 -80°C，24h 后转液氮。DMSO 在 37°C 对细胞有毒，解冻后尽快稀释。

ref: Freshney (2015) Culture of Animal Cells, 7th ed.
